When calling `python`, emit exactly the tool-call format shown elsewhere in this prompt for this model. The green center (N color) moved from (40, 41) to (38, 39) after pressing UP. So the arrow keys move the green center within the gray container. The green center is at rows 38-39, cols 10-11 now.
Let me continue exploring. I should try moving the green center to different positions and see what happens when I click targets. Maybe the green center's position determines which object is affected when I click a target.
Let me try moving the green center further up and then clicking the blue target to see if the behavior changes.

sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try moving the green center to different positions and see what happens
# First, let me move it up more and then click the blue target

# Move green center up twice more
action(['UP', 'UP'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
